articles.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
articles.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

articles.title: Ex-Anduril engineer raises $42M to build the Amazon of composite parts
articles.description: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin has drawn on a motorsports background, and his experience working for Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, to tackle making faster, cheaper, and better composites.

articles.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
articles.description: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members, or employers.

articles.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
articles.description: The specification lets developer, compliance and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

articles.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial recognition feature
articles.description: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

articles.title: Focused Energy raises whopping $240M Series A for laser-powered fusion tech
articles.description: Another fusion startup has raised another a massive round to make this type of power a reality.

articles.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
articles.description: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

articles.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
articles.description: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app, each of the new tools bundles integrations, instructions, and context to allow Codex to approximate a specific job.

articles.title: Board, the new game startup from Mirror founder Brynn Putnam, raises $20M, has already sold thousands
articles.description: Board, the startup building what it calls "together tech" designed to bring people into the same room, has closed a Series A led by Union Square Ventures.

articles.title: Password manager Dashlane says hackers stole some customersвҖҷ password vaults
articles.description: The password manager giant said hackers were able to "brute-force" its two-factor system, allowing them to access customer accounts and download their password vaults.

articles.title: Turning your purse into a cyberdeck is the most fun way to resist big tech
articles.description: The women building these over-the-top, bedazzled cyberdecks arenвҖҷt in it for the glitter alone. This trend is reaching its peak at a time when people feel powerless against big tech.

articles.title: Why VivaTech 2026 is the place to see EuropeвҖҷs AI strategy take shape
articles.description: The global AI race is often framed as a battle between the United States and China. But at VivaTech, Europe is expected to make the case for an entirely different model.

articles.title: Meta tests вҖҳSeriesвҖҷ for episodic Reels on Instagram and Facebook
articles.description: Meta told TechCrunch that it's considering ways to monetize the new feature, but didn't share specifics on what that could look like.

articles.title: X caters to creators with new вҖҳReact with VideoвҖҷ feature
articles.description: X will now let you 'react with video' to posts.

articles.title: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
articles.description: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries вҖ” targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare, and communications where a cyberattack could affect 100 million people.

articles.title: AppleвҖҷs MacBook Neo is winning over a new generation of buyers
articles.description: The MacBook Neo shipped 1.1 million units in its first weeks on sale, IDC estimates, as Apple pushes deeper into the mainstream laptop market.

articles.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 takes place June 23-26
articles.description: Groceries and household essentials will be a main focus of this year's deals event.

articles.title: Blue Origin plans to launch New Glenn again this year after explosion
articles.description: CEO Dave Limp said damage to the company's launchpad in Florida was not as bad as expected. But Blue Origin still hasn't shared the cause of last week's explosion.

articles.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
articles.description: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

articles.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
articles.description: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

articles.title: Blue Origin has set a very aggressive return-to-flight timeline
articles.description: "The propellant farm, oxygen, liquid hydrogen, and LNG tanks are all in good shape."

articles.title: Slate Auto gets serious about privacy for its bare-bones EV pickup
articles.description: With no embedded modem, the Slate Truck is the antithesis of today's connected cars.

articles.title: Trump's DOE restarts energy rebate program with dumb conditions
articles.description: Switching from fossil fuels to electricity for heating is no longer covered.

articles.title: Impulse Space raises $500 million as orbital maneuvering race heats up
articles.description: "The market's going to continue to find exciting new things."

articles.title: AI costs how much? GitHub Copilot users react to new usage-based pricing system.
articles.description: Some report burning through their whole monthly "AI credit" allotment in a single day.

articles.title: Why cats prefer silver vine to catnip and other May highlights
articles.description: Prehistoric mining in the Pyrenees, a new species of tiny blue octopus, slapstick acoustics, and more.

articles.title: Moderna gets $50 million to develop mRNA Ebola vaccine against Bundibugyo
articles.description: Amid a raging Ebola outbreak, officials "urgently accelerate development" of vaccines.

articles.title: Hackers duped Meta AI support chatbot to steal celebrity Instagram accounts
articles.description: Pricey Instagram handles were stolen and resold before Meta patched the exploit.

articles.title: Microsoft's Surface Laptop Ultra looks like its first true MacBook Pro competitor
articles.description: It's Microsoft's least-weird attempt at a high-end mobile workstation.

articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.description: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.

articles.title: New Trump vaccine order based on "no credible scientific evidence," doctors say
articles.description: Even Danish researchers think it's bizarre.

articles.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman after multiple ChatGPT-linked murders
articles.description: Altman has an "utter disregard" for human lives, Florida AG says.

articles.title: From 15 hours to one minute: How AI/ML is speeding up GM's development
articles.description: From CFD and FEA to digital twins, carmaking now involves a lot of virtualization.

articles.title: Allegedly trashing Airbnbs to test robots puts startup in legal trouble
articles.description: Lawsuit seeks $12,000 from startup that allegedly damaged home in robot tests.

articles.title: AMD extends Socket AM5 support through at least 2029; AM4 refuses to die
articles.description: The 5800X3D returns at $349, while the 7700X3D debuts at $329.

articles.title: ROG Xbox Ally X20 adds OLED screen, control upgrades
articles.description: But the hardware refresh is tethered to a bundle with pricey AR glasses.

articles.title: Nvidia RTX Spark comes to Windows PCs with Arm CPU, RTX GPU, and unified memory
articles.description: Nvidia's new chips will power laptop workstations and mini desktop PCs at first.

articles.title: Intel: Our upcoming AI chip will be cheaper, run cooler than Nvidia, AMD options
articles.description: Crescent Island is an air-cooled chip that uses LPDDR5 memory.

articles.title: An OpenAI model solved a famous math problem that stumped humans for 80 years
articles.description: I tried to explain OpenAIвҖҷs solution more clearly than OpenAI did.

articles.title: On its 40th anniversary, we reassess 1986's SpaceCamp
articles.description: Is it a hidden gem, a cult classic, or hopelessly dumb? We vote "all of the above."

articles.description: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.

articles.description: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

articles.description: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

articles.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
articles.description: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

articles.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
articles.description: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.

articles.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
articles.description: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.

articles.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
articles.description: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

articles.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
articles.description: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the companyвҖҷs behalf.

articles.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
articles.description: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

articles.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
articles.description: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

articles.title: Boston ChildrenвҖҷs uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
articles.description: Boston ChildrenвҖҷs Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.

articles.title: How Braintrust turns customer requests into code with Codex
articles.description: How Braintrust engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to run experiments and code faster.

articles.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
articles.description: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.

articles.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
articles.description: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.

articles.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
articles.description: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.

articles.title: OpenAIвҖҷs Frontier Governance Framework
articles.description: Explore OpenAIвҖҷs Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

articles.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
articles.description: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

articles.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
articles.description: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.

articles.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
articles.description: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.

articles.title: WarpвҖҷs big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
articles.description: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.

articles.title: Election information and safeguards in 2026
articles.description: Ahead of global elections, weвҖҷre helping people access information, supporting cyber defenders, and increasing AI transparency

ai.summary:
д»Ҡж—ҘAIеҠЁжҖҒж‘ҳиҰҒ

1. **еӨҡжЁЎжҖҒдёҺзү©зҗҶAIжЁЎеһӢиҝӣеұ•**пјҡNVIDIAеҸ‘еёғйҰ–дёӘејҖж”ҫзҡ„е…ЁжЁЎжҖҒжЁЎеһӢCosmos 3пјҢз”ЁдәҺзү©зҗҶAIжҺЁзҗҶдёҺиЎҢеҠЁпјӣJetBrainsжҺЁеҮә12BеҸӮж•°зҡ„ж··еҗҲдё“е®¶жЁЎеһӢMellum2пјӣGoogleеұ•зӨәGemini OmniеҸҠ3.5жЁЎеһӢзҡ„еӨҡйЎ№еә”з”Ёжј”зӨәгҖӮ
2. **жң¬ең°еҢ–дёҺж•ҲзҺҮжҸҗеҚҮ**пјҡHolo 3.1е®һзҺ°еҝ«йҖҹжң¬ең°еҢ–и®Ўз®—жңәдҪҝз”Ёд»ЈзҗҶпјӣReachy MiniжңәеҷЁдәәе…ЁйқўиҪ¬еҗ‘жң¬ең°иҝҗиЎҢпјӣPyTorchеҸ‘еёғtorch.profilerе…Ҙй—ЁжҢҮеҚ—пјҢеҠ©еҠӣжЁЎеһӢжҖ§иғҪеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ
3. **дјҒдёҡзә§AIйғЁзҪІдёҺйҖ»иҫ‘дјҳеҢ–**пјҡејәи°ғеҸҜжү©еұ•дјҒдёҡAIйҮҮз”ЁйңҖи¶…и¶ҠеӨ§иҜӯиЁҖжЁЎеһӢпјҢдҫқиө–д»ЈзҗҶйҖ»иҫ‘пјӣOpenAIзҡ„Codexжү©еұ•иҮіеӨҡи§’иүІгҖҒе·Ҙе…·дёҺе·ҘдҪңжөҒпјӣTravelersдҝқйҷ©е…¬еҸёеңЁе…ЁзҫҺйғЁзҪІAIй©ұеҠЁзҡ„зҗҶиө”зі»з»ҹгҖӮ
4. **еүҚжІҝжҠҖжңҜе®һи·ө**пјҡGoogleеҲ©з”ЁGeminiжһ„е»әI/O 2026еӨ§дјҡеҶ…е®№пјҢе№¶жҺЁеҮәAI StudioвҖңж°ӣеӣҙзј–з ҒвҖқдә’еҠЁй—®зӯ”пјӣFutures Labеұ•зӨәзңҹе®һAIеҺҹеһӢпјӣOpenAIе…іжіЁйқ’е°‘е№ҙе®үе…ЁдёҺе…ЁзҗғйўҶеҜјеҠӣгҖӮ
5. **еӨ§и§„жЁЎжЁЎеһӢи®ӯз»ғжҠҖжңҜ**пјҡTRLпјҲTransformer Reinforcement Learningпјүеј•е…ҘHubжЎ¶зҡ„DeltaжқғйҮҚеҗҢжӯҘжҠҖжңҜпјҢе®һзҺ°дёҮдәҝеҸӮж•°жЁЎеһӢзҡ„й«ҳж•Ҳи®ӯз»ғдёҺеҲҶеҸ‘гҖӮ

**д»Ҡж—ҘжңҖеҖјеҫ—е…іжіЁзҡ„еҸ‘еұ•**пјҡNVIDIA Cosmos 3дҪңдёәйҰ–дёӘејҖж”ҫзҡ„е…ЁжЁЎжҖҒзү©зҗҶAIжЁЎеһӢпјҢж Үеҝ—зқҖAIд»ҺиҜӯиЁҖзҗҶи§Јеҗ‘зү©зҗҶдё–з•ҢжҺЁзҗҶдёҺиЎҢеҠЁзҡ„е®һиҙЁжҖ§и·Ёи¶ҠпјҢеҗҢж—¶еӨҡе®¶жңәжһ„еңЁжң¬ең°еҢ–йғЁзҪІдёҺд»ЈзҗҶйҖ»иҫ‘дёҠзҡ„зӘҒз ҙпјҢжӯЈжҺЁеҠЁAIд»Һе®һйӘҢиө°еҗ‘е®һйҷ…еә”з”ЁгҖӮ
